name: Everflow Performance Marketing API
what_it_does: Everflow performance marketing platform REST API for performance advertisers, affiliate networks, and brands to manage affiliate campaigns, track conversions, prevent fraud, and analyze partner performance at scale. Enables AI agents to manage offer and campaign creation for performance marketing program automation, handle affiliate and partner onboarding and tracking link generation for partner recruitment automation, access conversion event tracking and postback configuration for attribution automation, retrieve real-time performance reporting and analytics for campaign optimization automation, manage fraud detection and traffic quality filtering for affiliate compliance automation, handle payout rule configuration and commission calculation for partner compensation automation, access click and impression data for attribution analysis automation, retrieve sub-affiliate and media buyer management for network management automation, manage cap and budget management for campaign spend control automation, and integrate Everflow with advertising platforms (Facebook, Google), payment processors, and CRM systems for end-to-end performance marketing network management.
use_cases: Managing affiliate offers from performance network automation agents
Detecting fraud from traffic quality compliance agents
Tracking conversions from performance attribution automation agents
Optimizing partner programs from campaign analytics agents
not_for: Brand-safe influencer marketing at scale (use AspireIQ or CreatorIQ)
Loyalty and referral programs for consumers (use Yotpo or LoyaltyLion)
B2B SaaS partner ecosystem (use PartnerStack or Alliances)
best_when: A performance advertiser, affiliate network operator, or brand wanting AI agents to automate offer management, conversion tracking, fraud detection, partner commission calculation, and network analytics within Everflow's performance marketing platform.
avoid_when: FTC ENDORSEMENT GUIDE AFFILIATE DISCLOSURE ENFORCEMENT: Automated affiliate campaign management via Everflow must verify that affiliates include FTC-required material relationship disclosures; automated campaign without affiliate disclosure compliance creates brand FTC liability for undisclosed affiliate endorsements. CLICK FRAUD AND TRAFFIC QUALITY AUTOMATED BLOCKING: Everflow fraud detection provides traffic quality scoring; automated blocking of traffic sources without manual review risks blocking legitimate affiliates; implement fraud alert review workflow with human confirmation before automated affiliate account termination based on automated fraud scoring. GDPR CONSENT FOR TRACKING PIXEL AND COOKIE: Automated Everflow conversion tracking pixel deployment on EU-targeted campaigns must comply with ePrivacy Directive and GDPR consent requirements; automated tracking without consent mechanism creates EU cookie law violation; implement consent management platform integration before Everflow pixel deployment for EU audiences.

auth.notes: Everflow uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Vancouver, Canada HQ. Founded 2016 by Ran Friedman and Jamie Shostak. Private. Performance marketing platform for affiliate networks, brands, and performance advertisers. Real-time postback tracking. Fraud detection and traffic quality tools. Sub-affiliate management for network operators. Competes with TUNE (formerly HasOffers), Impact, and CJ Affiliate for performance marketing tracking.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — monthly subscription for performance marketers
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly subscription based on click volume; network operator and brand tiers; fraud detection included in standard plans
pricing.notes: Vancouver CA. Private. Monthly subscription. Click-volume-based pricing. Fraud detection included. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; reporting and management queries throttled; webhooks for conversion and payout events

known_agent_gotchas: POSTBACK URL SIGNATURE VERIFICATION FOR CONVERSION SECURITY: Everflow postback conversion tracking uses server-to-server postback URLs; automated conversion event ingestion from Everflow postbacks must verify postback signature to prevent fraudulent conversion injection; automated conversion processing without postback authentication creates vulnerability to fake conversion injection that inflates affiliate commission payouts

CLICK CAP AND DAILY BUDGET ENFORCEMENT FOR CAMPAIGN CONTROL: Everflow offer caps (click caps, conversion caps, daily budgets) are enforced server-side; automated campaign management must respect cap boundaries; automated offer launch without cap configuration creates unlimited spend exposure for affiliate network operators; always configure caps before automated offer activation

AFFILIATE TIER AND PAYOUT RULE INHERITANCE: Everflow payout rules can be set at offer level, affiliate level, and campaign level with inheritance; automated commission calculation must resolve the correct payout rule for each conversion; automated commission calculation that uses offer-level payout for affiliates with custom tier creates incorrect commission amounts

REPORTING DATA FRESHNESS FOR REAL-TIME DECISIONS: Everflow real-time reporting has 15-minute data lag for aggregate stats; automated campaign optimization decisions based on Everflow reporting should account for data freshness; automated bid and cap adjustment based on hourly stats will react to incomplete period data; use rolling window analytics rather than current-period stats for automated optimization decisions

FRAUD SCORE CALIBRATION FOR AUTOMATED BLOCKING: Everflow fraud detection scores traffic quality but fraud score thresholds are configurable; automated traffic blocking at default threshold may block marginal-quality traffic that is still profitable; calibrate fraud score threshold for automated blocking based on network-specific traffic quality standards before deploying automated affiliate account suspension
agent_readiness.security_notes: Performance marketing. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US/CA/EU. Affiliate tracking, conversion, and payout data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Performance marketing. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US/CA/EU. Affiliate, conversion, and campaign data.
